decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 50/2843 lines reworked (1.8%, 30/50). 0/25 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 2.7% (9/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 64. Session 11: 59 (process:40 efficiency:13 ttfw:6). Session 12: 48 (process:40 efficiency:8 ttfw:0).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 242/242 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
